    • setPausePanelActionHandler

      public void setPausePanelActionHandler(PausePanelActionHandler handler)
      Sets the pause panel action handler to use for setting up pause panel actions. If set, this will be used instead of the callback-based setup.
      Parameters:
      handler - The pause panel action handler
